title: Location
description: Triggered mostly by where the user went.

title: Activity
description: Triggered by what the user did, especially movement intensity or workout type.

title: Landmark
description: Triggered by notable rare places, especially globally recognizable landmarks.

title: Routine
description: Triggered by repeated patterns or meaningful loops across days.

title: Special
description: Reserved for seasonal events, campaigns, or future one-off unlocks.
